REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NON-OPPOSITION ON FILE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) AND JUDGMENT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MITCHELL, MITCH RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT 3515-17-19 SACRAMENTO STREET HOME OWNER'S ASSOCIATION $177,421.34 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $177,871.34, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT CONFIRMING FINAL ARBITRATION AWARD
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER MITCHELL, MITCH

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen J. Sherman, esq. (415-296-0900) of Sheppard Uziel Law Firm for Petitioner/Moving party MITCH MITCHELL.
No other appearances.

No argument. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER's Petition To Confirm Final Arbitration Award is GRANTED. Non-opposition on file. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) and judgment. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
